[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011011110 6
1 100110011 5
2 100000000 1
3 000001111 4
4 101110100 5
5 100011101 5
6 011001110 5
7 000001111 4

13 31 111011110 7
